title.en: STAMPS; STAMPING OR NUMBERING APPARATUS OR DEVICES (marking meat A22C17/10; embossing combined with printing B41F19/00; selective printing mechanisms B41J; embossing decorations or marks B44B5/00; marking or coding completed packages B65B61/26; ticket printing and issuing, fare registering, nonprinting aspects of franking apparatus G07B)
Portable hand-operated devices without means for supporting or locating the articles to be stamped, i.e. hand stamps; Inking devices or other accessories therefor
{combined with other articles (combination of writing appliances with stamps B43K29/005)}
{Pocket stamps}
with one or more flat stamping surfaces having fixed images
with a flat stamping surface and changeable characters
with curved stamping surfaces for stamping by rolling contact
with stamping surfaces adapted for application to non-flat surfaces
for offset or intaglio stamping
for stencilling
for multicolour stamping
Details

Apparatus for stamping articles having integral means for supporting the articles to be stamped (means for printing on articles of special shape or having a surface of particular configuration B41F17/00)
{Cheque stamping machines (B41K3/02 - B41K3/62 take precedence)}
with stamping surface located above article-supporting surface
with stamping surface located below article-supporting surface
with co-operating stamping and counter-stamping members
with means for deforming or punching the copy matter
Stamping apparatus with selection mechanisms for successively stamping and delivering lists or other items giving information, e.g. for warehouse administration, washing lists, supermarket guides
Means for handling copy matter
Inking devices
Details or accessories
Plier-like tools for stamping, or stamping and delivering, tickets or the like
{Inking devices therefor}
{with means for deforming the copy matter}
with means for varying the image stamped
with devices for collecting counterfoils, or with other means for recording stamping operations (counting devices G06M)
